message:
feat: Phase 4.1 - MySQL wire protocol server

Add MySQL-compatible server to LanceQL:
- packets.zig: MySQL packet definitions (HandshakeV10, OK, ERR, EOF, ColumnDef)
- auth.zig: mysql_native_password authentication with SHA1
- protocol.zig: Packet encode/decode over TCP
- session.zig: Per-connection state, handles COM_QUERY, SHOW commands
- server.zig: TCP listener with threaded connection handling
- main.zig: CLI entry point with port/bind options

Features:
- MySQL wire protocol on port 3306 (configurable)
- mysql_native_password auth with user store
- Responds to SELECT @@version, SHOW DATABASES, SHOW TABLES
- Placeholder query execution (returns OK/result set)

Usage: lanceql-server -p 3306 -b 127.0.0.1
Connect: mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root
